title: Latte con valore aggiunto: il caso A2A2
description: A guide on leveraging A2A2 milk genetic selection to add value to dairy production by creating niche markets for Parmigiano-Reggiano A2A2 through targeted herd management and certification. It outlines methods for herd transformation, market potential in countries like New Zealand, and practical suggestions for genetic screening, certification, and sustainable breeding strategies.
